title: Promptfoo eval-as-config and regression gates
task_prompt: Given a flawed skill and failed eval traces, diagnose root cause and propose the smallest patch plus regression test.
assertions: must propose eval additions before broad rewrite
must keep patch minimal unless structural rewrite is justified
license_notes: Promptfoo MIT; verify before redistributing snippets

title: DSPy/ProTeGi-style failure-to-patch optimization
task_prompt: Treat failed skill behavior as gradients: cluster failures, propose candidate patches, and accept only measured improvements.
assertions: must not optimize against TEST split
must report regressions separately from aggregate wins
must distinguish static anatomy from behavioral success
license_notes: DSPy MIT; ProTeGi paper/public methods; verify any code licenses
